competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Théo Hernández.
Foul by Nicolas Jackson (Senegal).
Sadio Mané (Senegal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Nicolas Jackson.

events.description: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔射门被封堵。 尼古拉斯·杰克逊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Senegal. Nicolas Jackson is caught offside.
Désiré Doué (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 伊德里萨·加纳·盖耶犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 登贝莱射门被封堵。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Sadio Mané.
Foul by Dayot Upamecano (France).

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Krépin Diatta.
Nicolas Jackson (Senegal) hits the left post with a left footed shot from the left side of the box. Assisted by El Hadji Malick Diouf following a fast break.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·杰克逊射门偏出。 哈吉·马利克·迪乌夫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Mike Maignan.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Ousmane Dembélé (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Nicolas Jackson.

events.description: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔射门偏出。 尼古拉斯·杰克逊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jules Koundé (France).
Attempt saved. Sadio Mané (Senegal) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Ismaïla Sarr.

events.description: 萨迪奥·马内射正。 伊斯梅拉·萨尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Handball by Pape Gueye (Senegal).
Corner, France. Conceded by Kalidou Koulibaly.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high.

events.description: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, France 0, Senegal 0.
Second Half begins France 0, Senegal 0.
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Désiré Doué (France) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Dayot Upamecano.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射门偏出。 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Dayot Upamecano (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, France. Jules Koundé is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Jules Koundé.

events.description: 奥利塞射正。 朱尔斯·昆德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Édouard Mendy.
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Krépin Diatta.
VAR Decision: No Penalty France.
Attempt blocked. Théo Hernández (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 西奥·埃尔南德斯射门被封堵。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 姆巴佩 进球，奥利塞 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Senegal. Nicolas Jackson is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Édouard Mendy (Senegal).
Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Adrien Rabiot.
Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射正。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Édouard Mendy.

events.description: 易卜拉欣姆巴耶 登场，伊斯梅拉·萨尔 离场
哈比卜·迪亚拉 登场，拉明·卡马拉 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Kylian Mbappé (France).
Foul by Habib Diarra (Senegal).
Offside, Senegal. Nicolas Jackson is caught offside.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉 登场，登贝莱 离场

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉 进球，阿德里安·拉比奥 助攻
班巴·迪昂 登场，尼古拉斯·杰克逊 离场
恩迪亚耶 登场，帕普·盖伊 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Édouard Mendy (Senegal). Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 奥利塞参与进攻。
拉扬·切尔基 登场，德西尔·杜埃 离场
帕特·西塞 登场，伊德里萨·加纳·盖耶 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Senegal. Conceded by Jules Koundé.
Fourth official has announced 8 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Rayan Cherki (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 哈吉·马利克·迪乌夫犯规。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 易卜拉欣姆巴耶 进球，恩迪亚耶 助攻

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
